title: oxygraphis gelidus
intro: Oxygraphis gelidus, also known as Yangzhi or Himalayan Oxygraphis, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region, particularly in Nepal and Tibet. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oxygraphis gelidus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being and longevity.
